content:
Aquarius August 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Commit to the partnership, then settle the worth
Key Dates Solar eclipse New Moon Aug 12 (Leo, 7th house) / Sun into Virgo Aug 23 / Pisces lunar eclipse Full Moon Aug 28 (2nd house)
Love 7th house solar eclipse is one of 2026’s biggest partnership chapters
Career Partnership-led work peaks early; income and worth climax late
Crystal of the Month Amethyst
Lucky Colors Electric violet, ice blue, silver
Lucky Number 7
Affirmation I meet the other fully; I let the worth settle.

This Month’s Energy

Aquarius, August 2026 is eclipse season, and the eclipses work your partnerships and your money. The New Moon in Leo on August 12 is a solar eclipse, falling in your 7th house of partnership, marriage, and contracts — one of the year’s loudest relationship chapters, a turning point around a marriage, a business partnership, a contract, or a significant other. Then August 28 brings a lunar eclipse Full Moon in Pisces, falling in your 2nd house of income, self-worth, and material resources — a climax around a money chapter, a worth threshold, or a new income direction. August’s pattern is: commit to the partnership early, then settle the worth late.

Key Dates for Aquarius in August 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Aquarius Do / Avoid
Aug 12 New Moon in Leo — Solar Eclipse 7th house — fresh start in partnership, marriage, contracts, and significant others; eclipse amplifies a long-building relationship decision Do: commit, sign the contract, marry, name the partnership
Avoid: running from a relationship decision that has been building for months
Aug 23 Sun enters Virgo 8th house season — shared resources, intimacy, debts, depth through late September Do: renegotiate shared money, address intimacy, settle the debt
Avoid: power struggles over shared resources
Aug 28 Full Moon in Pisces — Lunar Eclipse 2nd house — income, self-worth, material resources climax; a long-building money chapter or worth threshold reaches a turning point Do: set the new rate, sign the income contract, name what your work is worth
Avoid: financial decisions made in panic
Aug 11 Venus enters Virgo (your 8th) Warmth toward intimacy, shared resources, and private depth through September Do: deepen the bond, address shared money gently, soften
Avoid: avoiding the shared-resources conversation
Aug 19 Mars enters Sagittarius 11th house — friendship, community, future vision become action zones through October Do: widen the circle, lead the group, share the future
Avoid: going it alone when allies are visible
Aug 30 Mercury enters Libra (your 9th) Belief, travel, teaching, and the wider view move forward Do: publish the wider view, book the trip, teach the class
Avoid: staying small when the horizon is calling

Career & Money

For Aquarius, August’s career story pivots around partnership-led work. The solar eclipse in your 7th house on August 12 can bring a significant business partnership, contract, or collaboration to a turning point — eclipse new moons in the 7th house often mark the beginning (or renegotiation) of a major working alliance.

The Pisces lunar eclipse on August 28 falls in your 2nd house of income and self-worth — a climax around a money chapter, a new income direction, a worth threshold, or a rate reset. Combined with the Sun entering Virgo (your 8th house of shared resources) on August 23 and Venus entering Virgo on August 11, the second half strongly favors money reorganization — both personal income and shared resources. Crystals for wealth can support the work; the practical move is commit to the partnership early, then settle the rate late.

Love & Relationships

The solar eclipse in your 7th house of partnership and marriage on August 12 is the love signature of 2026 for Aquarius. Eclipse new moons in the 7th house often mark major relationship chapters — a marriage, a commitment, a business partnership, or the beginning of a significant new bond.

The Pisces lunar eclipse on August 28 falls in your 2nd house of self-worth — worth and partnership are linked; how you value yourself now shapes what you accept in relationship. Venus entering Virgo (your 8th house of intimacy) on August 11 deepens private bonds through September. Crystals for love can support the work; the deeper practice is letting the worth settle so the partnership can land cleanly.

Health & Wellness

Eclipse seasons stress the body, and Saturn-ruled (traditional) and Uranus-ruled (modern) Aquarius carries tension in the lower legs, ankles, and nervous system. The 7th house solar eclipse on August 12 can surface held tension in the lower back and hips (the relationship zone) — gentle movement and partner-style practices (yoga with a friend, walking with a partner) are especially helpful in the days around it.

After the Sun enters Virgo (your 8th house of release and recovery) on August 23, the medicine is depth-rest and private recovery. Amethyst, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with calm, nervous-system regulation, and spiritual depth — a useful symbolic companion for the airy Aquarius nature during a partnership-and-money month. Uranus-ruled Aquarius tends to live in the head; grounding breathwork, ankle mobility, and screen-free evenings are especially helpful. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Amethyst

Why Amethyst fits Aquarius this month. You are Uranus-ruled (modern) and Saturn-ruled (traditional), and August hands you a 7th house solar eclipse (partnership) plus a 2nd house lunar eclipse (worth). Amethyst — traditionally tied to calm, clarity, balance, and spiritual insight — is the stone that helps Aquarius meet the other without disappearing into the self. Where Clear Quartz would amplify thoughts and Carnelian would push, Amethyst holds the nervous system steady. The air-sign intelligence meets a stone that grounds it.

How to use it during August 2026. Hold Amethyst over your heart for 5 minutes before any partnership conversation in the days around August 12 (the 7th house eclipse). Place it where you do money work on August 28 (the 2nd house lunar eclipse).

Best date to use it: August 28, the Pisces lunar eclipse in your 2nd house — hold Amethyst at your third eye for 5 minutes before any money or worth conversation, naming what your work is now worth.

Read more: Amethyst Meaning and Best Crystals for Aquarius.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Aquarius — August 2026

When: August 28, the Pisces lunar eclipse in your 2nd house.
Crystal: Amethyst.
Intention: Let the worth settle; let the partnership land cleanly.

  1. Cleanse Amethyst under moonlight on the night of August 27 (eve of the eclipse).
  2. Set the intention on the 2nd house theme: write down one number — the rate, the price, the savings goal — that reflects what your work is now worth, given the partnership that just landed.
  3. Act in the days following: communicate the rate, sign the contract, open the new account. Amethyst in your pocket during the act.
  4. Reflect at the Aquarius New Moon in late January / early February 2027 (your 1st house): how has the self settled now that the worth and the partnership have aligned? Hold Amethyst during the review.

Shop Aquarius Crystals for August 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Aquarius crystal guide for stones connected with clarity, innovation, calm, and friendship — including the Amethyst that holds your nervous system steady during a partnership-and-worth eclipse season. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Aquarius August 2026

Is August 2026 a good month for Aquarius?

It’s a partnership-and-money month. The Leo solar eclipse on August 12 (your 7th house) is one of 2026’s biggest relationship chapters. The Pisces lunar eclipse on August 28 (your 2nd house) brings a money or worth climax.

How will the solar eclipse on August 12 affect Aquarius?

It falls in your 7th house of partnership, marriage, and contracts. Expect a turning point around a marriage, business partnership, contract, or significant new bond. Commit; sign; say yes.

What does the Pisces lunar eclipse on August 28 mean for Aquarius?

It falls in your 2nd house of income, self-worth, and material resources — a climax around a money chapter, a worth threshold, or a new income direction. Set the new rate; sign the income contract.

What is the best crystal for Aquarius in August 2026?

Amethyst — it holds the nervous system steady while partnership and money reorganize, exactly what a 7th house solar eclipse plus a 2nd house lunar eclipse demand of an airy sign. See the full Aquarius crystal guide →

Why is partnership and money linked for Aquarius in August 2026?

The 7th house (partnership) eclipse on August 12 often brings a working alliance; the 2nd house (worth) eclipse on August 28 then resets the rate or income direction. The worth you settle on after the 28th should reflect what the partnership made visible.
